title: elaphoglossum pala
intro: Elaphoglossum pala is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as a type of epiphytic fern. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum pala include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, arthritis, and skin infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
